Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: The Studium app is an essential companion app for all Studium Members.
Changelog:
Studium overlay modules:
- Adds GreenZone and Crafters states to the compact overlay.
- Adds Crafters overlay status for FC chest sync and craft-set data.
- Adds quick FC chest and manual sync controls from the Crafters overlay state.
Punchline: An essential companion app for all Studium members.
